- [0] AXWindow "App Store Connect - Brave" [actions=[raise]]
  - [1] AXButton (Back) [actions=[press,showmenu]]
  - [2] AXButton (Forward) [actions=[press,showmenu]]
  - [6] AXTextField = "appstoreconnect.apple.com/apps" (Address and search bar) [actions=[press,showmenu]]
  - [47] AXWebArea "App Store Connect" [actions=[showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
    - [48] AXHeading "App Store Connect" [actions=[showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
      - [49] AXLink (App Store Connect) [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
    - [50] AXList [actions=[showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
      - [51] AXLink (Apps) [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
        - [52] AXStaticText = "Apps" [actions=[showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
    - [61] AXButton "George Nijo Account name menu" [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
    - [70] AXForm "Add new version" [actions=[showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
      - [71] AXTextField = "1.4.0" (Version number) [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
      - [72] AXButton "Cancel" [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
      - [73] AXButton "Submit" [actions=[press,showmenu,scrolltovisible]]
- [283] AXMenuBar [actions=[cancel]]
  - [284] AXMenuBarItem "Apple" [actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
    - [285] AXMenu [actions=[cancel]]
      - [286] AXMenuItem "About This Mac" [id=_aboutThisMacRequested: actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
      - [287] AXMenuItem "System Information" [id=_systemInformationRequested: actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
      - [292] AXMenuItem "Recent Items" [id=_recentsRequested: actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
        - [293] AXMenu [actions=[cancel]]
          - [294] AXMenuItem "Applications" [actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
  - [300] AXMenuBarItem "File" [actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
    - [301] AXMenu [actions=[cancel]]
      - [302] AXMenuItem "New Tab" [actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
      - [303] AXMenuItem "Submit Feedback" [actions=[cancel,press,pick]]
